objective:
FICHE_STRATEGIE v1
id: breakout_donchian_adx
archetype: breakout_donchian_adx
family: breakout
timeframe: 1h
side: both
indicators:
- donchian(period=25)
- adx(period=20)
- atr(period=14)
entry:
- long: close > donchian.upper and adx.adx > 30
- short: close < donchian.lower and adx.adx > 30
exit:
- condition: cross_any(close, donchian.middle) or adx.adx < 20
risk:
stop_atr_mult: 2.0
tp_atr_mult: 4.5
description: ATR stop-loss (2.0x) and take-profit (4.5x)
constraints:
- no_lookahead: true
- only_registry_indicators: true

iterations.hypothesis: Fallback contractuel: proposition générée automatiquement pour maintenir la progression quand la sortie LLM n'est pas exploitable.

pre_reflection.text: [Pre-reflection] This strategy uses Donchian Channels with Adx for trend identification and ATR to set risk management. It aims for long positions when the close price is above the upper band of the channels and adx value is greater than 30, while short positions are taken when it's below lower band and adx values more than 30. Stop loss is at 2x atr and take profit at 4.5x atr. Potential risks include false signals in choppy markets or high volatility leading to excessive drawdown. If results are poor, changing the fallback contract for better signal generation can be considered such as using RSI, EMA and ATR instead. For mediocre returns, adjusting parameters like period for indicators, stop loss multiplier and take profit multiplier might help improve Sharpe ratio. In case this strategy doesn't work out, trying a different approach may include employing other technical indicators or fundamental analysis.

iterations.hypothesis: Using ATR, Bollinger bands and RSI will provide better signals for trade entries.

pre_reflection.text: [Pre-reflection] This iteration uses ATR, Bollinger bands and RSI in addition to the existing Donchian channels, Adx, and atr indicators. The hypothesis is that these additional indicators will provide better trade signals. However, this strategy's historical performance has been poor with a Sharpe ratio of -20 and negative return for 1 iteration. If results remain poor (negative return), I would consider the following changes: Change the stop loss to a lower value or remove it entirely if possible. Additionally, change the take profit level to be more aggressive or remove it altogether. Other alternative approaches that could be tried include using different types of indicators such as Garch models for volatility prediction, or incorporating additional fundamental data into the model.

iterations.hypothesis: L'utilisation de l'ATR et du Donchian Band permet d'identifier des breaks de tendance avec une entrée/sortie robustes même en marchant market conditions (noisy)
